Capability: Inventory policy optimization (Safety Stock / ROP / gap / investment)
Objective_Function: SS = z*sigma*sqrt(LT); ROP = EDLT + SS; Gap = ROP - Current_Stock; Investment = max(0,Gap)*Unit_Cost
Constraints: Service level by (ABC x Criticality); two-tier lead time capped 1-24 mo
sum(Investment_i * x_i) <= PROCUREMENT_BUDGET (Rs 1 crore); item affordability filter
Stage1 reserve = pct*budget restricted to S1/S2 insurance spares (floor); Stage2 knapsack on remaining budget

Objective_Function: SRRS = Criticality_Weight * Service_Factor * Positive_Gap; Procurement_Priority_Score = crit_w * gap * unit_cost
Decomposes SRRS into log-shares of Criticality / Service_Level / Gap; SRRS_Per_Rupee = SRRS / Investment
Reports items funded, budget utilization %, risk reduction, S1-S4 criticality mix
Aggregates count / value / gap / investment per (ABC,Criticality) cell
Rule engine assigning disposition per PL
Maps zone-level strategic stock to 6 BUs by depot column
Concatenates per-BU registries/summaries into cross-BU view
